alt: Secretarybird actively capturing and swallowing a large locust on the savanna
caption: Renowned opportunistic predators, their diet includes insects, lizards, small mammals, and notoriously, venomous snakes.
acquisitionNotes: Incredible action shot of active foraging and prey swallowing behavior. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/04/Day_33_Secretarybird_%28Sagittarius_serpentarius%29_swallowing_a_locust_..._%2853589436519%29.jpg
